pi_items.source: Verified against the task description and verifier script which explicitly require saving the final workbook to this path.
Verified against the task description and verifier script which explicitly require renaming the current sheet to 'Collection' and creating a second sheet named 'Logistics Dashboard'.
Verified against the task description and verifier script which explicitly instruct adding 'Crate_Type', 'Conservation_Flag', and 'Handling_Category' as headers.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires saving the processed museum collection data to '/home/ga/Documents/moma_logistics.xlsx'. The final workbook must contain exactly two sheets named 'Collection' and 'Logistics Dashboard'. The 'Collection' sheet must include the new column headers 'Crate_Type', 'Conservation_Flag', and 'Handling_Category'. The dataset used is an embedded subset of real historical artwork data from MoMA.
